essence: Shapes the final narrative of films and videos by selecting, arranging, and refining footage.

identity.title: Film Editor
identity.summary: Cuts and assembles footage, refines pacing, collaborates with directors, and ensures the emotional and narrative flow of the final product.

salary.notes: Editors in film, TV, and high‑end commercial work can earn significantly more.

qualifications: Experience with editing software (Premiere, DaVinci Resolve, Avid)
Attention to detail and ability to work under pressure
Collaboration with directors and sound teams

lifestyle.description: Editing suites, long hours during deadlines, and deep creative collaboration with directors and producers.

habits: Collaborates with sound and VFX teams
